known_issues: Admin dashboard not connected to backend - submitted assessments not displaying in list or stats cards
Assessment submission works and shows report, but data not persisting to admin view

existing_features.title: Update useQueries hook to fetch real assessment data from backend using the new query functions instead of returning empty arrays
Connect QuickStatsCards component to display real statistics from backend data instead of calculating from empty arrays

new_feature_requests.summary: Connect admin dashboard to backend database to display submitted assessments list and stats cards
Implement backend query function to retrieve all submitted assessments with details including student name, score, total questions, submission timestamp, and answers breakdown
Implement backend function to calculate and return admin dashboard statistics including total assessment count, average score, alert users count, and recent submissions count
Connect UserAssessmentDataTable component to display the list of submitted assessments fetched from backend with all filtering and sorting functionality working on real data
